Hero.title: Where Creative Vision Meets Artificial Intelligence
Hero.subtitle: Aiva Studio offers next-generation AI-powered visual and video production for fashion and retail brands. Speed up your campaigns, lower your costs.

SectorPage.ctaTitle: Let's Plan Production for Your Brand
SectorPage.ctaDesc: Contact us to bring your collections to life with AI-powered models and creative visuals.

Services.title: What We Do
Services.subtitle: We highlight your brand in the digital world with our creative and technological solutions.
Services.s1Desc: We professionally present your models in any background and concept without the need for a studio environment.
Services.s2Desc: We produce dynamic, high-resolution, and story-driven videos for social media, ads, and e-commerce websites.
Services.s3Desc: We quickly prepare your seasonal collections for launch with themes and AI models matching your brand's aesthetic language.
Services.s4Desc: We build high-standard and consistent product catalogs for e-commerce sites and B2B ordering platforms.

Testimonials.title: Client Reviews
Testimonials.subtitle: Reviews of brands sharing their experience with Aiva Studio.
Testimonials.t1Text: Working with Aiva Studio dramatically shortened our collection prep phase. The visuals they generated with AI were identical to actual studio shoots.
Testimonials.t2Text: We cut our catalog shooting costs by 70%. The speed and quality are truly impeccable.
Testimonials.t3Text: The videos they produced for our social media campaigns brought great conversion rates. A very professional team.

Faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
Faq.subtitle: Curious things about our workflows and AI production.
Faq.q1: How does AI-powered visual generation work?
Faq.a1: Taking basic photos of your products, we merge them with our advanced AI models and your desired background/concept to transform them into professional campaign visuals.
Faq.a2: We are much faster compared to classic studio shoots. Depending on the request scale, we typically deliver all assets within 3 to 7 business days.
Faq.a3: We work on a project basis or monthly packages. You can contact us to get the most suitable offer for your needs.

FinalCta.title: Launch Your Campaign Today
FinalCta.subtitle: Transcend traditional production limits. Promote your collection with world-class visuals.

About.title: Who We Are
About.subtitle: We bring tomorrow's production technologies to your brand today.
About.p1: Aiva Studio is a next-generation creative studio merging creativity with AI technologies. We provide fast visual and video solutions for brands, especially in the fashion, apparel, and retail sectors.
About.p2: We eliminate high budgets, difficulties in model sourcing, location constraints, and time losses associated with traditional studio shoots. We make all your dreamed concepts real while keeping true to your brand identity.

Contact.title: Get in Touch
Contact.subtitle: Let's discuss your creative vision and craft the perfect visual world for your brand together.
